struct SensorReading {
    timestamp: u64,
    value: f64,
    is_anomaly: bool,
}

fn analyze_readings(readings: &[SensorReading]) -> (f64, f64, usize) {
    // BAD: three separate passes over the same slice
    let sum: f64 = readings.iter().map(|r| r.value).sum();
    let mean = sum / readings.len() as f64;

    let max_val = readings.iter().map(|r| r.value).fold(f64::NEG_INFINITY, f64::max);

    let anomaly_count = readings.iter().filter(|r| r.is_anomaly).count();

    (mean, max_val, anomaly_count)
}
